title: Fei's Planter Boxes
description: A mod that adds flower and plant boxes to the game!
body:
## <center>Feintha's Planter Boxes</center>

#### <center>Adds cute, but vanilla style planter boxes to the game!</center>

![Overhead view of a planter box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/P7UpqfLs/images/2bfbe62d0322938caa73c340901b2d6ef3ed4249.png)

Ever wanted a more compact way of making planter boxes with spruce trapdoors? Well, now you can!

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>


⚠️When giving a planter box a name or sign, make sure you name the item in an anvil! It won't apply otherwise!
### Planter boxes can have signs, banners and names! 

- Any flowers, plants, or crops can be put inside these- Including Nether Wart (don't ask, it just does and I love it that way!)
- Cacti are the only ones that cannot be placed inside, as all blocks keep their vanilla behaviour!
- You can till / hoe the base dirt planter to get a farmland planter. You can put crops in the farmland variants!
- Crouch and Right Click when placing to place a planter without edges!
## Crafting Recipe:

![Crafting Recipe for the Planter Box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33937cdd9eaf94707bec6bd880558866d955925f.gif)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mod Incompatibilities</summary>
- None known
</details>
